name: Campaign Studio
description: Build UTM campaign URLs & shorten links. Includes history, presets, QR codes, dark mode, and CSV export.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://api.qrserver.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.tinysrc.me https://api.qrserver.com
